# PuPageHeader

## Intent

- page header
- page title
- page actions
- page metadata

## Prefer When

- Use for page titles with optional subtitle, metadata, and actions.

## Avoid When

- Avoid custom page header markup when this component covers the structure.

## Import

```ts
import { PuPageHeader } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

## Props

- `as`
- `title`
- `subtitle`
- `titleAs`
- `showBack`
- `backLabel`
- `density`
- `surfaceLevel`
- `variant`
- `bordered`

## Slots

- `default`
- `actions`
- `back-icon`
- `meta`
- `subtitle`
- `title`

## Events

- `back`

## Composition

- PuButton
- PuChip
- PuInlineNotice

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/display/PuPageHeader.story.vue`

- Basic
- Back And Actions
- Meta
- Surface Compact

## Types

- `PuPageHeaderDensity`
- `PuPageHeaderSurfaceLevel`
- `PuPageHeaderTitleAs`
- `PuPageHeaderVariant`

## Caveats

- Use surfaceLevel for neutral page/content depth and variant for plain, soft, outline, or solid treatment.
